PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'putty|platformio|pio|python|monitor|Code|teraterm|realterm|arduino' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(try { Stop-Process -Id 6928 -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "PID 6928 beendet" } catch { Write-Output "Konnte PID 6928 nicht beenden: $_" }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; Get-Process -Id 6928 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ProcessName,Id)
